svg.font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Phase 2 auto-forward cadence toggle (wireframe)
svg.desc: Wireframe of the per-customer auto-forward toggle below the status tracks. Left side stacks the label "Auto-forward to Clumit Insight (every 5 min while signed in)" and a one-line description of the browser-bound, tab-visibility-paused cadence. Right side shows an on/off switch, drawn here in the off (default) position.
svg.text: Auto-forward to Clumit Insight (every 5 min while signed in)
Off by default. Pushes baseline events and stories every 5 min while signed in;
pauses on hidden tab, stops on sign-out. Sync now works regardless.
